settings.description:
Our Culture

We are a young start-up in midst of a sprawling garden with lots of trees. We love working late into the nights as much as we love sitting out with our laptops on a couch or garden bench. We love challenges, innovation and working with passion.

We are bunch of motivated minds looking for people like us. So if you are obsessed with learning, communicating and believe in helping others create beautiful aesthetics garden space, then we are made for each other.

(It will be an added bonus if you also like to grow your own organic greens)

Positions open:

1. Individuals with experience of leading teams in ecommerce environment

2. Creative thinkers 

2. Graphics designers

3. Bloggers, Digital marketing & SEO specialists

4. Vendor onboarding specialist

5. Logistics specialist

6. Developers

7. Trainees

Send your resume to info@theaffordableorganicstore.com.

 If you would like to know more, then please leave a message here:
